evidence: src/Infrastructure/Dependencies.cs — ConfigureServices wired into Web startup; BasketService/OrderService used by Web controllers
src/Infrastructure/Dependencies.cs — Web registers Infrastructure services
src/PublicApi/CatalogBrandEndpoints/CatalogBrandListEndpoint.cs — uses IRepository<CatalogBrand> from ApplicationCore
src/PublicApi/appsettings.json CatalogConnection, IdentityConnection — Infrastructure DbContexts registered
PublicApi responses map to BlazorShared DTOs (CatalogBrandDto, etc.)
src/BlazorAdmin/Services/CatalogItemService.cs — imports BlazorShared.Interfaces and BlazorShared.Models
src/BlazorAdmin/wwwroot/appsettings.json baseUrls.apiBase — runtime HTTP calls to PublicApi
src/Infrastructure/Data/EfRepository.cs — implements IRepository<T> from ApplicationCore
src/ApplicationCore/Services/OrderService.cs — _basketRepository.FirstOrDefaultAsync(basketSpec) to read basket for checkout
src/ApplicationCore/Services/OrderService.cs — _itemRepository.ListAsync(catalogItemsSpecification) to read catalog items for price snapshot
src/ApplicationCore/Entities/BasketAggregate/BasketItem.cs — CatalogItemId foreign key reference to Catalog domain
src/BlazorAdmin/Services/CatalogItemService.cs — all CRUD operations target catalog API endpoints
src/BlazorAdmin/CustomAuthStateProvider.cs — fetches user info for authentication state
src/Infrastructure/Identity/IdentityTokenClaimService.cs — implements ITokenClaimsService from ApplicationCore.Interfaces
CatalogBrandListEndpoint uses IRepository<CatalogBrand> and IMapper; CatalogItem uses IAggregateRoot
BasketService uses IRepository<Basket> and IAppLogger; Basket implements IAggregateRoot
OrderService uses IRepository<Order>, IRepository<Basket>, IRepository<CatalogItem>, IUriComposer
src/Infrastructure/Data/CatalogContext.cs — EF Core DbContext targeting SQL Server
src/Infrastructure/Identity/AppIdentityDbContext.cs — Identity tables in SQL Server
src/Infrastructure/Data/EfRepository.cs — extends RepositoryBase<T> from Ardalis.Specification.EntityFrameworkCore
src/ApplicationCore/Entities/CatalogItem.cs — Guard.Against.NullOrEmpty, Guard.Against.NegativeOrZero
src/ApplicationCore/Entities/BasketAggregate/BasketItem.cs — Guard.Against.OutOfRange
src/BlazorAdmin/Services/CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator.cs — ILocalStorageService
src/PublicApi/CatalogBrandEndpoints/CatalogBrandListEndpoint.cs — IMapper _mapper

cycles.impact: OrderService reads both Basket and CatalogItem repositories in a single CreateOrderAsync call. This is not a circular dependency per se, but it means Order module has high efferent coupling — it cannot be extracted without also bringing Basket and Catalog along. This is a migration complexity risk, not a compile-time cycle.

high_coupling_components.reason: Injects 4 dependencies: IRepository<Order>, IRepository<Basket>, IRepository<CatalogItem>, IUriComposer. Orchestrates across 3 domain aggregates in a single method.

Single EF Core DbContext exposes 7 DbSets covering all domain entities (Basket, BasketItem, CatalogItem, CatalogBrand, CatalogType, Order, OrderItem). High afferent coupling — all data access flows through this context.
Injects ICatalogLookupDataService<CatalogBrand>, ICatalogLookupDataService<CatalogType>, HttpService — then makes 3 parallel API calls on each List/GetById operation.

high_coupling_modules.reason: Highest afferent coupling (5 modules depend on it). Contains EfRepository, IRepository interfaces, IAppLogger, IEmailSender, IUriComposer, IAggregateRoot.
Depends on Basket (reads basket for checkout), Catalog (reads catalog items for snapshot), and CrossCutting — highest efferent coupling of domain modules.
Used by Basket (CatalogItemId reference), Order (catalog item snapshot), and Admin (full CRUD). Cannot be extracted without impacting all other business modules.
